---
id: get-job-kpi-graphs-graph-id-jobs-job-id-get
title: "Get job status"
description: "Returns the current persisted job state, including operational timestamps, stage, heartbeat, counters, and stage timings."
sidebar_label: "Get job status"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: api/graph-kpi/wordlift-graph-kpi-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get job status"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/kpi/graphs/{graph_id}/jobs/{job_id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns the current persisted job state, including operational timestamps, stage, heartbeat, counters, and stage timings.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"graph_id","in":"path","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","description":"Public WordLift graph identifier (`account.id`).","title":"Graph Id","example":"1506805"},"description":"Public WordLift graph identifier (`account.id`)."},{"name":"job_id","in":"path","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","description":"Unique job identifier.","title":"Job Id","example":"job_20260313_5bdaac21"},"description":"Unique job identifier."}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Job status.","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"properties":{"job_id":{"type":"string","title":"Job Id","description":"Unique job identifier.","example":"job_20260313_5bdaac21"},"graph_id":{"type":"string","title":"Graph Id","description":"Public WordLift graph identifier.","example":"1506805"},"snapshot_date":{"type":"string","title":"Snapshot Date","description":"Logical KPI day targeted by the job.","example":"2026-03-13"},"status":{"type":"string","title":"Status","description":"Current job status.","example":"completed"},"stage":{"type":"string","title":"Stage","description":"Current or last completed job stage. Cloned snapshots use `clone`.","example":"validate"},"started_at":{"anyOf":[{"type":"string"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Started At","description":"Timestamp when the job started.","example":"2026-03-13T17:40:22Z"},"finished_at":{"anyOf":[{"type":"string"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Finished At","description":"Timestamp when the job finished, if complete.","example":"2026-03-13T17:50:02Z"},"heartbeat_at":{"anyOf":[{"type":"string"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Heartbeat At","description":"Last heartbeat timestamp emitted by the worker.","example":"2026-03-13T17:49:55Z"},"documents_seen":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Documents Seen","description":"Number of source documents scanned so far."},"documents_transformed":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Documents Transformed","description":"Number of source documents transformed so far."},"triple_rows_written":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Triple Rows Written","description":"Number of helper/assertion rows materialized so far."},"issues_written":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Issues Written","description":"Number of validation issue rows persisted so far."},"retry_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Retry Count","description":"How many stage retries were used."},"error_code":{"anyOf":[{"type":"string"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Error Code","description":"Machine-readable failure code, if any."},"account_dataset_id":{"anyOf":[{"type":"string"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Account Dataset Id","description":"Resolved internal dataset identifier used for Mongo access."},"website_url":{"anyOf":[{"type":"string"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Website Url","description":"Configured website URL resolved for the seconds."},"runtime_profile_json":{"anyOf":[{"additionalProperties":true,"type":"object"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Runtime Profile Json","description":"Structured calculate-stage runtime profile including fetch/analyze/flush timings and Mongo batch latency
